form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Not seen since she finished last of 8 at Le Mans September 12 over 2300m, 34 len behind Mets Ta Ceinture carrying 62kg at $43. form.formComment: She is resuming after a nine months break. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at Vichy July 25 over 2400m, soft track; 23 len behind Mathilde Du Berger carrying 61kg at $35. On debut fourth in a small field at Vichy May 25 over 2400m, 4.5 len behind Mabriska carrying 60.5kg at $14. Plenty more attractive propositions in this race.
